aiCommentCN: 行情像老公，越静越可怕。
aiSummaryCN:
【机构视角】
机构投资者认为比特币仍然具有较强的投资吸引力。
【关键观察】
BTC价格：67,566美元，24h涨跌：+1.4%，恐慌贪婪指数：8，表明市场仍有上涨空间。
机构资金持续流入，市场信心增强。
【未来展望】
从机构投资视角来看，比特币有望继续上涨。
【一句提醒】
投资比特币仍存在风险，投资者需谨慎判断。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Institutional investors believe Bitcoin still has strong investment appeal.
[Key Drivers]
BTC price: $67,566, 24h change: +1.4%, Fear & Greed Index: 8, indicating market still has upside potential.
Institutional funds continue to flow in, boosting market confidence.
[Outlook]
From an institutional investment perspective, Bitcoin is expected to continue rising.
[Reminder]
Investing in Bitcoin still carries risk, investors must exercise caution.
